questions.text: Differentiate between cyclones and anti-cyclones.
Explain the terms vulnerability and exposure.
State the main objectives of participatory mapping.
List are the two main components of risk assessment.
Explain target-oriented preparedness and task-oriented preparedness.
State the basic key steps of search and rescue.
Explain participatory stakeholder engagement.
Define risk and crisis communication.
Explain the role of State Disaster Management Authority.
Explain any three natural disasters with examples from our country.
Identify the importance of ozone layer and the reasons for its depletion.
Explain Indian monsoon in detail.
Define lithosphere. Explain its composition and features.
Explain Green House Effect in detail.
Explain the uses of participatory mapping.
Explain empirical methods and analytical models in measuring physical vulnerability.
Explain the types of vulnerability.
Explain hazard mapping with GIS.
Explain the disaster risk management framework.
Explain the types of disaster prevention.
Explain the primary objectives of disaster mitigation.
Explain the hazard and disaster mitigation functions of ecosystems.
Explain the three basic forms of stakeholders.
State and explain the potential benefits of increased stakeholder participation.
Identify the effective ways of promoting stakeholder participation in disaster risk reduction.
Define crisis. List the instances of crisis.
State and explain the objectives of national policy on disaster management?
List the priorities for action as per Sendai Framework.
Explain the first priority as per Sendai framework? How can it be achieved?
State and explain the role of NDRF in the context of National Policy on Disaster Management.
